title: Cold Email Infrastructure for IT Services — Win Managed Services and Technology Contracts
description: Learn how MSPs, IT consultancies, and technology service companies use ColdRelay's dedicated cold email infrastructure to prospect businesses, win managed services contracts, and scale their client base with reliable deliverability.

painPoints.title: Why IT Services Companies Need Dedicated Cold Email Infrastructure
painPoints.content:
IT services companies — managed service providers (MSPs), IT consultancies, cybersecurity firms, and cloud migration specialists — compete for contracts in a crowded market. Cold email is the most efficient prospecting channel for reaching IT decision-makers, but IT services companies face ironic infrastructure challenges:

**You sell technology but struggle with email ops.** IT services companies are experts at managing clients' infrastructure, but setting up and maintaining cold email infrastructure is a different skill set. Email deliverability is its own discipline with unique rules.

**Your primary domain handles client communication.** Tickets, project updates, security alerts, SLA notifications — your primary domain is a critical client communication channel. Using it for cold outreach creates unacceptable risk for client-facing communications.

**Technical prospects are harder to reach.** IT directors, CTOs, and CISOs have sophisticated spam filters and security tools. Getting through to them requires properly authenticated infrastructure — not cobbled-together Gmail accounts.

**Contract values justify significant outreach investment.** Managed services contracts range from $2,000-50,000+/month. Even a low conversion rate on outreach delivers massive ROI. But you need reliable infrastructure to reach enough prospects.

**MSP competition is intensifying.** The MSP market is growing but so is competition. Every MSP in your market is prospecting the same businesses. The ones with proper outreach infrastructure reach decision-makers first.

**Referrals are slowing down.** Many MSPs built their business on referrals, but referral volume plateaus. Cold email provides a scalable, predictable pipeline supplement that doesn't depend on existing clients remembering to introduce you.

solution.title: How ColdRelay Solves IT Services Prospecting Challenges
solution.content: ColdRelay gives IT services companies the email infrastructure that matches the professionalism of their service delivery. Microsoft 365 mailboxes on dedicated Azure tenants carry the enterprise credibility that IT decision-makers expect — you're reaching CTOs from Microsoft infrastructure, not from a budget mail server. Dedicated IPs ensure your outreach reputation is isolated from other senders. Auto DNS configures SPF, DKIM, and DMARC automatically — the same authentication standards you'd recommend to your own clients. At $1/mailbox/month, running 100-200 mailboxes for prospecting costs less than a single hour of managed services revenue. No warmup means when a competitor goes out of business or a contract comes up for renewal in your market, you can start reaching affected businesses immediately.

howItWorks.title: Setting Up ColdRelay for IT Services Prospecting

steps.title: Create Outreach Domains
steps.content: Choose secondary domains for outreach that relate to your MSP or IT consultancy brand. Keep your primary domain for client ticketing, project communication, and support. One domain supports 100-150 mailboxes.

steps.title: Order Infrastructure
steps.content: Start with 50-100 mailboxes through ColdRelay's self-service portal. MSPs with multiple verticals (healthcare IT, legal IT, etc.) may want separate domains for each.

steps.title: Deploy in Hours
steps.content: ColdRelay provisions infrastructure in 2-4 hours with auto DNS. No warmup — connect to your sequencing tool and start reaching IT decision-makers immediately.

steps.title: Target by Industry Vertical
steps.content: Set up campaigns targeting your strongest verticals: healthcare organizations needing HIPAA compliance, law firms needing document management, manufacturers needing OT security, etc.

steps.title: Scale with Contract Wins
steps.content: As your MSP grows, add mailboxes to increase prospecting volume. Volume pricing ($0.85 at 200+, $0.70 at 1,000+) reduces costs as you scale.

benefits.title: Benefits for IT Services Companies Using ColdRelay

items.title: Enterprise-Grade Credibility
items.content: Microsoft 365 mailboxes on dedicated Azure tenants carry the credibility that CTOs and IT directors expect. Your outreach comes from enterprise infrastructure, not budget hosting — matching the professionalism of your service delivery.

items.title: Client Communication Protected
items.content: Support tickets, SLA notifications, project updates, and security alerts run on completely separate infrastructure from cold outreach. No risk to the communication channels your existing clients depend on.

items.title: Proper Authentication (Practice What You Preach)
items.content: Auto-configured SPF, DKIM, and DMARC mean your outreach follows the exact email security best practices you'd recommend to your own clients. IT prospects notice and appreciate this.

items.title: Reach Decision-Makers Through Spam Filters
items.content: Dedicated IPs and proper authentication are the keys to reaching technically sophisticated prospects. ColdRelay's infrastructure is built to pass the security scrutiny that IT buyers apply to incoming email.

items.title: ROI on First Contract
items.content: At $100/month for 100 mailboxes, a single MSP contract ($2,000-50,000+/month MRR) pays for years of outreach infrastructure. The economics are overwhelmingly favorable.

faqs.question: How do MSPs typically use cold email?
faqs.answer: MSPs prospect business owners and IT managers at companies without internal IT (or with overburdened IT teams). Common angles: technology assessments, security audits, compliance reviews, and cost savings analyses. ColdRelay provides the infrastructure; your messaging sells your expertise.

faqs.question: Can I target specific industries?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use separate domains for each vertical (healthcare IT, legal IT, financial services IT, etc.) for reputation isolation and targeted messaging. ColdRelay's per-mailbox pricing makes multi-vertical prospecting affordable.

faqs.question: How do I find IT decision-maker email addresses?
faqs.answer: LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, ZoomInfo, and similar tools provide contact data for CTOs, IT Directors, and Office Managers. Filter by company size, industry, and location to match your ideal client profile.

faqs.question: Will technical prospects notice if my email infrastructure is bad?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. IT decision-makers check email headers, verify sender authentication, and notice deliverability red flags. ColdRelay's properly authenticated Microsoft 365 infrastructure passes technical scrutiny.

faqs.question: How many mailboxes does a typical MSP need?
faqs.answer: Small MSPs start with 50-100 mailboxes. Growing MSPs with multiple verticals may need 200-500. Large MSP organizations with dedicated sales teams may need 1,000+. ColdRelay's volume pricing scales with your growth.
